response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (20% below share threshold) conflicts with our crisis-mode policy (minimum 60% SoC to share); our own SoC at 37% cannot safely support outbound transfers while islanded and managing 1 kW load.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
